svg.title: SMART on FHIR deployment architecture
svg.desc: Tiered architecture diagram for SMART on FHIR showing numbered interactions between User, SMART App, WSO2 platform components, OpenFGC, and FHIR Server.
svg.text: External actors (User, SMART App, FHIR Server)
3 & 9 share the IS ↔ IAM Extensions path — 3: pre-issue token hook, 9: introspection hook
11 routes through WSO2 API Manager before reaching the SMART App
